en: Oh, I'm gonna have a drink.
Yes, sir. What you sipping on?
Probably just a hard seltzer.
Nice. What kind? Just a JCPenney.
The department store?
Yeah, they're doing hard seltzers now.
What? Yeah. Ever since White Claw blew up, everyone's doing them.
ko: 뭐? 응. White Claw 터진 이후로 다들 만들고 있어.

en: Bud Light, Corona, JCPenney.
Don't they just make clothes?
Yeah, I don't know, man. Okay, I'm not on the board of the company.
ko: 응, 나도 모르겠어. 내가 이사회에 있는 건 아니잖아.

en: This is just a thing that I like.
What flavor is it?
Men's jackets? It's not all men's jackets.
ko: 남성용 재킷? 전부 남성용 재킷은 아니야.

en: It's a variety pack.
I'm sipping on Belts and Ties.
ko: 나는 벨트 앤 타이 맛 마시고 있어.

en: Does it taste like Belts and Ties?
No, it tastes like grape. You stupid? Been in the house.
Oh, bed man. Oh, you're drinking JCPs?
ko: 오, 이 사람. 오, 너 JCP 마시는 거야?

en: You know it. You know about this? Got some seltzers myself.
ko: 당연하지. 이거 알아? 나도 셀처 가져왔어.

en: Jiffy Lube. Lube it up. Cheers, man.
Good to see you.
What is going on? Come on, everyone's doing it.
JCPenney, Jiffy Lube.
Exxon, Verizon. Dr. Riccardi. Who?
My dentist.
That one's actually really gross.
I don't understand why you like these.
ko: 왜 이걸 좋아하는지 이해가 안 돼.

en: You don't have to understand everything, John.
Yeah, like we don't understand what you see in your girlfriend.
ko: 응, 우리도 네 여자친구의 어떤 점이 좋은지 이해 못하는 것처럼.

en: What? But we don't get angry.
ko: 뭐? 근데 우린 화 안 내잖아.

en: No, we don't yell at you. No.
Am I awake? That was, like, at the summer variety pack.
ko: 내가 깨어있는 거 맞아? 저건 여름 버라이어티 팩이야.

en: Oh, nice. This is awesome.
That's for everybody. And, John, if you want one, take one.
ko: 다 같이 마시라고. 그리고, John, 하나 원하면 가져.

en: Oh, I hate when these get in there. Oh, is that a belt buckle?
ko: 아, 이게 들어가면 싫은데. 어, 그거 벨트 버클이야?

en: Yeah, the JCPenney ones, sometimes they get in there.
ko: 응, JCPenney 것들은 가끔 들어가. 응.

en: Yeah. Stop slurping like that.
Just chill out.
Who's this an impression of? Oh, I'm John.
John, me. Yeah, it's John. Oh, yeah, that's cool.
Does the...desk have one?
I don't know. Probably not. I don't know.
Okay, so, yeah, it does have one. What is going on?!
ko: 좋아, 그러니까, 응, 있네. 이게 무슨 일이야?!

en: Try one! Fine!
That's pretty good. Oh, my God.
Cheers. Cheers, brothers.
I was wrong.
Desk art seltzer. It's in the desk.
ko: 책상 아트 셀처. 책상 안에 있어.

en: It's in the desk.
